title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. gramineum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. gramineum, also known as the Chinese water plantain or narrow-leaved water plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant native to East Asia, belonging to the Alismataceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to promote diuresis, reduce edema, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. gramineum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. gramineum can be prepared as an herbal decoction, infusion, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
